archetype: Electric & Neon (Archetype 7 - GTA 6 Vice City Aesthetic)
vibe: Satirical, villainous, retro-futuristic travel agency. Danger rebranded as luxury.

typography.installation_instructions: Add Google Fonts: Righteous, Outfit, Caveat

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: High tension, bento grids for structured chaos, wide margins.

bento_grid.container: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 p-4 md:p-8

surface_styles.glass_panel: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0F0C29]/70 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)]
surface_styles.neon_card: bg-black border border-[#FF007F]/50 rounded-xl relative overflow-hidden group hover:border-[#FF007F] transition-colors duration-300
surface_styles.neon_glow: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-[#FF007F]/0 via-[#FF007F]/10 to-[#FF007F]/0 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF007F] hover:bg-[#FF007F]/80 text-white font-bold py-3 px-6 rounded-lg shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,0,127,0.5)] transition-all uppercase tracking-wider
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#00E5FF] text-[#00E5FF] hover:bg-[#00E5FF]/10 hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,229,255,0.3)] font-bold py-3 px-6 rounded-lg transition-all uppercase tracking-wider

map.style: Full-screen custom SVG or interactive canvas layout. Must use deep indigo background with glowing cyan and pink paths for the A* Route planner.
map.markers: Use glowing pulsing dots for POIs. Hovering over a POI should trigger a glitchy/retro info panel with satirical descriptions.
map.regions: Vice City, Grassrivers, Leonida Keys, Port Gellhorn, Ambrosia, Mt. Kalaga NP

comparison_slider.style: Vertical or horizontal slider using react-compare-slider or similar. Split screen showing 'Boring Real Miami' vs 'Deadly Luxury Leonida'.
comparison_slider.handle: Neon pink glowing handle with 'drag' arrows.

chatbot.style: Retro terminal window aesthetic for the chat interface. Monospace fonts for user input, but 'Honest John' responds with his avatar and sleazy dialogue.

hero_background.description: Neon-lit Miami street scene at night. Apply a heavy gradient overlay (black to transparent) to ensure text legibility.

miami_before.description: Sunny day at a Miami guard tower.
miami_before.usage: Left side of the Before/After Comparison Slider

leonida_after.description: Neon-lit car/building at night to represent Leonida's nightlife and danger.
leonida_after.usage: Right side of the Before/After Comparison Slider

honest_john_avatar.description: Man in Hawaiian shirt gesturing, looks like a sleazy travel agent.
honest_john_avatar.usage: Avatar for the AI Chatbot Honest John

neon_flamingo_accent.usage: Decorative element or background for the Chatbot widget

hardware_ad.usage: Affiliate section for RTX 5090 hardware recommendations.

animation_guidelines.hover_states: All cards and buttons must have glowing hover states using drop-shadow and border color transitions.
animation_guidelines.glitch_effect: Apply subtle CSS glitch effects to headings periodically to emphasize the 'hacked/GTA' aesthetic.
animation_guidelines.page_transitions: Use fast, snappy transitions, avoiding slow fades. The UI should feel responsive and slightly chaotic like a high-speed pursuit.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, sliders, map regions, chat inputs) MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='map-region-vice-city', data-testid='chat-submit-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme. Do NOT use pure white backgrounds anywhere.
Implement the bento grid for the landing page dashboard.
Use Shadcn components but heavily strip them of the default 'Vercel' look; apply the surface_styles defined here.
The Map must be an interactive SVG (use a library or raw SVG paths) with clickable paths for 'Vice City', 'Grassrivers', etc.
For the comparison slider, use a library like react-compare-slider or framer-motion to create the drag effect.
Integrate the 'Honest John' chatbot using the provided avatar and ensure responses reflect the villainous/satirical tone.
